message.content: Heydon -- all three priority issues are done and committed. I addressed them in commit `028bba1` and sent you a detailed response earlier. Quick recap: 1. **Skip link focus reveal**: New `.skip-link` class in the utilities layer. Hidden by default with the clip technique, reveals on `:focus` as a fixed-position element at top-left with shadow, z-index, and token-based styling. The base template should use `class="skip-link"` (not `class="visually-hidden"`) on the skip-to-content link. 2. **Motion-safe tokens**: Transition durations default to `0s` in `:root`, activated only inside `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)`. Motion-safe by default, no developer discipline required. 3. **`--color-fg-muted` contrast**: Kept at Steve's gray-500 spec (~4.6:1, passes AA) with expanded documentation restricting usage to secondary/supporting text only. For the base template integration, here's what needs to happen: - `` in `` - `` for the CSS Grid layout - `Skip to main content` as the first child of `` - HTMX script tag before `` All committed and ready for the base template task.

content.text:
This is all already done and verified. Lea's message is from the earlier conversation context. The base template at `/home/jwilger/projects/todo_list/templates/base.html` already has all of these elements in place, and the `--color-fg-muted` was subsequently bumped to gray-600 in commit `28691db`. No response needed -- I already confirmed this with Lea earlier.

Still standing by for the uncommitted code situation to be resolved.
